overall.description: A first-person exploration of a rainy night at the Saint Denis docks in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player walks from a covered train platform along railway tracks and onto a wooden pier with cargo, carts, and a moored steamship, ending with a close examination of a fish cleaning table.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered train platform transitioning to open tracks

events.description: exiting covered platform into open rainy area with visible train tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered platform with posters and benches, emerging into the rain toward the tracks

entered.detail: metal and wood roof structure covering the platform area
empty wooden slatted bench against the wall
wall with multiple faded posters and advertisements
vertical iron columns supporting the platform roof
warm yellow oil lamp hanging from the roof structure
tall cast iron lamp post with glowing light
metal railway tracks reflecting the rain
large stone archway with SAINT DENIS signage visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered train platform with iron pillars and a wooden bench, illuminated by hanging lanterns. The player walks forward, exiting the shelter into a rainy night, approaching railway tracks with a distant stone archway visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered railway platform with cargo containers

events.description: passing under the Saint Denis stone archway into the dock district
turning right off the railway tracks toward the wooden dock area

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel railway tracks under a long metal canopy, passing through the Saint Denis arch

entered.detail: long industrial metal roof structure covering the tracks
wooden boxcar sitting on the side track
large wooden crate beside the tracks
multi-story brick building with glowing windows
covered bridge connecting buildings over the tracks

segments.scene_description: Walking along the railway tracks under a long metal canopy, the player passes wooden cargo containers and approaches the Saint Denis archway. After passing through the arch, the scene opens to industrial buildings with lit windows and an overhead pedestrian bridge before turning toward the docks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shipping dock with cargo carts and moored steamship

events.description: stepping from gravel tracks onto wooden dock planks
turning to survey the dock area with cargo carts and barrels

agents.ego_description: exploring the wooden dock area, walking past cargo carts and examining the moored steamship

entered.detail: wet wooden pier decking reflecting lamp light
old wooden wagons with large spoked wheels
stacks of metal shipping barrels
large white steamship moored at the dock with lit windows
two-story wooden dock house with warm interior lights
pyramid of wooden barrels
wooden table with fish remains and cleaning tools

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the wooden dock planks, leaving the railway behind. The open dock area features wooden cargo carts, stacked barrels, and a large moored steamship. The camera turns to survey the area, revealing a fish cleaning table and various dock structures illuminated by warm lamps against the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: fish cleaning station on the dock

events.description: approaching fish cleaning table revealing dead fish, knife, and blood stains
turning away from the table to view the steamship and dock buildings

agents.ego_description: closely examining a fish cleaning table with dead fish and blood, then turning to survey the dock and steamship

entered.detail: gutted fish remains on the wooden table
large knife resting on the table
dark red blood pooling on the table surface
bucket under the table with fish parts
large industrial crane structure on the dock

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a fish cleaning table for a close inspection, revealing dead fish, a butcher knife, and blood stains on the wet wood. After a moment, the player turns away, revealing the cargo crane and steamship in the background, continuing to explore the rainy dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered confines of a train platform into the rain-slicked industrial expanse of the Saint Denis docks. It begins under a covered platform illuminated by hanging lanterns, moving past iron pillars and a wooden bench before exiting into a heavy downpour toward distant railway tracks. As the camera advances along the tracks under a long metal canopy, it passes wooden cargo containers and a stone archway, eventually opening into a view of industrial buildings and an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts from the railway to the wooden planks of the docks, where the environment expands to reveal stacked barrels, cargo carts, and a massive moored steamship under the glow of warm lamps. Finally, the camera closes in for a detailed inspection of a blood-stained fish cleaning table and a butcher knife before turning back toward the cargo crane and the ship in the rainy night.
